visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two young women stand centered in a brightly lit toy or hobby retail store. The woman on the left has long, straight dark hair and is wearing a dark, tiered sleeveless dress with a pearl necklace. The woman on the right wears a vibrant blue long-sleeved sweater, a white lace-trimmed vest over it, and a dark blue beret. They are both gesticulating with their hands while looking directly at the camera with wide, expressive smiles. The background is filled with shelves and walls covered in small, colorful boxes and posters of various collectible toys. (2) The camera cuts to a slightly closer shot focusing on a white board or poster detailing a lottery game. It features colorful images of "Mega Space Molly" figures dressed as Sanrio characters. The women use their fingers to point at specific winning numbers listed on the poster: 10, 25, 68, 75, 90, and 99. Their facial expressions are animated, with raised eyebrows and open mouths. Bright yellow and pink text overlays appear at the top and bottom of the frame, partially obscuring the background. (3) The scene shifts to a close-up of a scratch-off or pull-tab grid consisting of many small grey circles. A hand, holding a gold binder clip, pulls back a white tab to reveal the number "20" printed in black on a white background. As the number is revealed, a comic-style "!!!" graphic with a yellow jagged border appears on screen. The women are then shown again, reacting with intense excitement, raising their fists in the air and displaying high-energy body language. (4) The women stand together, smiling broadly. The woman on the right holds a large, rectangular box with a yellow and pink design. The box is clearly labeled "Mega Space Molly" and "Sanrio Characters," showing various character illustrations like Hello Kitty, Kuromi, and Cinnamoroll. They lean towards each other and then the woman on the right moves the box closer to the camera, showcasing the product clearly. The lighting remains bright and even, highlighting the colorful packaging and the joyful expressions of the two individuals.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Slogan]: 我竟然中大獎！史上最狂8880元盲盒. [Subtitle]: 1抽650元的刮刮樂. (2) [Subtitle]: 最大獎是 價值8,880元三麗鷗盲盒. (3) [Subtitle]: molly 400%跟三麗鷗合作了. (4) [Subtitle]: 那這一次有出7個角色 人魚漢頓是裡面的隱藏款. (5) [Subtitle]: 其他款式只要抽到對應的數字. (6) [Subtitle]: 10 25 68 75 90 99 就有機會中獎. (7) [Variety]: 我想要它. (8) [Subtitle]: 來刮一個 我們來挑戰 就是這一個. (9) [Variety]: 20. (10) [Subtitle]: 啊 差一點 再減... 加個5或減個10. (11) [Subtitle]: 等你來挑戰. (12) [Subtitle]: 經過一番嘶殺後 想看我們戰果多慘 一定要記得看我們YouTube長片. (13) [Subtitle]: 這一盒就是我帶回家啦.

visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Two women; one in a dark off-the-shoulder dress with a pearl necklace, the other in a blue sweater with a white lace vest and a dark beret.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A retail store interior with walls covered in merchandise, mostly small toy boxes, blind box posters, and colorful promotional materials for collectible figurines.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched female voice speaks with rapid enthusiasm. Behind the voice, an upbeat, fast-tempo electronic pop track plays with a strong 4/4 beat and bright synth layers. A quick "whoosh" sound effect provides a sense of transition. (2) A second high-pitched female voice joins, creating a lively, overlapping dialogue. A sharp "ding" sound effect rings out during the explanation of the game rules. The background music maintains its energetic, high-arousal drive without interruption. (3) A clear mechanical "click" or "thud" sound is heard as a tab is pulled. This is immediately followed by a loud, high-arousal vocal cheer from both speakers. A comic "boing" sound effect is layered over the reaction to emphasize the result. (4) The music continues steadily as the speakers conclude with a friendly, inviting tone. A shimmering "sparkle" or "chime" sound effect is used as a brand/product reveal occurs. The audio track ends with a clean cut after the final sentence.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Explaining Rules -> Gameplay Action -> Result -> Call to Action.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase a high-value Sanrio-themed Molly blind box lottery game and encourage viewers to watch their longer YouTube video for the full results.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed explanation of product pricing, lottery rules, and physical showcase of the brand packaging.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-energy social media edit targeting collectors of designer toys and blind boxes.
